title: Deferred security items — DB migrations, CI/CD, and code hardening
summary: Findings from AUDIT-003 that require DB migrations, CI/CD changes, or further investigation before they can be safely applied. Includes: TOTP replay prevention (needs totp_last_counter column), 2FA enrollment missing password gate, share token hashing (schema change), billing_verification_codes missing per-row salt, BrowserBase session IDOR, AI chat cost-amplification (no rate limit), admin re-auth brute-force window, SECURITY_ALLOW_NON_BROWSER_API missing from env schema, unsubscribe endpoint PII leak, admin read operations with no audit trail, GitHub Actions mutable tag pinning (carry-over from AUDIT-002 ci-01), CSP img-src in next.config.mjs (only middleware.ts was fixed in AUDIT-003), LIKE metacharacter injection in access-rules, DKIM queries missing per-query timeout.
